text.title: Validation Methods Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Validation Methods application MUST enforce, plus a skip-this-methodology fallback. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Every opportunity MUST be evaluated against ALL three lenses (Problem Validation, Pain Mining, Niche Viability). Single-lens decisions are rejected.
rule.rationale: Single-lens decisions miss orthogonal failure modes — real painful problem in a tiny market is still a no.

rule.statement: Niche Viability MUST score all five criteria (market size 25%, competition 20%, barriers 20%, profitability 20%, founder fit 15%). Missing criteria are rejected.
rule.rationale: The weights are calibrated; dropping a criterion silently re-weights the rest and produces a misleading score.

rule.statement: The artefact MUST emit a combined decision: GO | NO-GO | NEEDS-MORE. Lens-by-lens decisions without a synthesis are rejected.
rule.rationale: The point of triangulation is the synthesis; emitting three uncombined verdicts pushes the decision burden onto the reader.

rule.statement: Each lens result MUST attach its underlying evidence log (problem-validation log, pain log, niche scoring sheet). Loose summaries are rejected.
rule.rationale: The combined decision can only be replayed if each lens' evidence is reachable.

rule.statement: The founder-fit criterion MUST be self-scored by the founder, not by the team. Inflated founder-fit scores are flagged.
rule.rationale: Founder fit affects execution risk independently of market attractiveness; an inflated score conceals the real risk.

rule.statement: If any Applies-If precondition fails OR any Skip-If condition triggers, do NOT apply this methodology. Emit a skip-record naming the failed precondition / triggered skip, and route the task to the correct methodology (or none).
rule.rationale: Methodology hygiene: mis-application produces worse artefacts than no methodology because downstream consumers trust the schema; the skip-record makes non-application traceable.
